name: Julie
history: Recent divorce. Financial struggles and adjustment to single life. Co-parenting. Multiple friendships deteriorated after the divorce. Complicated relationship with parents.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I am not perfect, I will be rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must hide my true self to be accepted.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of intimacy and emotional expression.
situation: Experiencing the breakdown of friendships following the divorce.
auto_thought: If I let people in, they will see how flawed I am.
behavior: Withdrawal from social interactions and emotional closeness.
